zh.Wraxall Manor, Long Ashton, Somersetshir: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特朗 艾希頓
zh.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Gorges於大約1370年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell43歲，母親Mary de Beauchamp31歲。他於大約1384年與Agnes Beauchamp在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1380年被列為sheriff of sommerset dorset。他去世於1404年4月16日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Gorges于大约1370年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell43岁，母亲Mary de Beauchamp31岁。他于大约1384年与Agnes Beauchamp在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1380年被列为sheriff of sommerset dorset。他去世于1404年4月16日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Gorges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Erwin, Heinz, Otto, Wilhelm.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in France named with Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (see Gorge 2).

variants.name: Gorge
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in a deep valley, from Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (from Old French gorge ‘throat’), or a habitational name from any of various places in France named with this word.
English: variant of   Gorges   2 or   George  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Gorges was born about 1370, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell, was 43 and his mother, Mary de Beauchamp, was 31. He married Agnes Beauchamp about 1384, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1380, at the age of 11, his occupation is listed as sheriff of sommerset dorset. He died before 16 April 1404, in his hometown.

fr.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Gorges est né environ 1370, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mary de Beauchamp, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Beauchamp environ 1384, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1380, à l’âge de 11 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of sommerset dorset. Il est décédé avant 16 avril 1404, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Gorges um 1370 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell 43 und seine Mutter Mary de Beauchamp 31. Er hat um 1384 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Agnes Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1380, als er 11 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of sommerset dorset aufgeführt. Er starb vor 16. April 1404 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gorges è nato il circa 1370 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Beauchamp, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Beauchamp circa 1384, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1380, all'età di 11 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of sommerset dorset. Morì prima del 16 aprile 1404, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Gorgesが約1370年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russellは43歳，母Mary de Beauchampは31歳であった。約1384年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでAgnes Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1380年，11歳の時，職業はsheriff of sommerset dorsetと記録されている。彼は1404年4月16日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Gorges(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Beauchamp(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Agnes Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1380년, 11세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of sommerset dorset이었다. 그는 1404년 4월 16일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gorges nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Beauchamp, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Beauchamp aproximadamente 1384, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1380, com 11 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of sommerset dorset. Ele faleceu antes 16 de abril de 1404, em sua cidade natal.

ru.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Gorges родился около 1370 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mary de Beauchamp, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Beauchamp около 1384 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1380 году, в возрасте 11 год,  он работал по профессии sheriff of sommerset dorset. Он умер перед 16 апрель 1404 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Gorges nació aproximadamente 1370, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Theobald Gorges alias Russell, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mary de Beauchamp, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnes Beauchamp aproximadamente 1384, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1380, a la edad de 11 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of sommerset dorset. Murió antes de 16 de abril de 1404, en su pueblo.
